class.name: Batch Provision with Lazy Lab Request functionality

test-method.name: TC13 - Normal Plan - Batch Provision with lazy lab request - Account

exception.message: Given open the browser and enter the Url....................................passed And login as tenant admin...................................................passed When click on select team option............................................passed And get test data from excel TC13...........................................passed And search and select team..................................................passed And navigate to Batch Provisioning of Labs page.............................passed And click on batch create button............................................passed And in batch provision details page enter name and description..............passed And click on next button....................................................passed And in choose user page enter the user email address in the search box and click on search.passed And select the search listed user checkbox..................................passed And click on next button....................................................passed And in the choose plan page provide plan id input in search box and select the listed plan.passed And click on next button....................................................passed And click on next button....................................................passed And in the settings page select lazy create option..........................passed And click on next button....................................................passed And click on finish button..................................................passed And click on confirm button on create batch provisioning labs pop-up........passed Then in the batch provisioning summary table check user listed and status and lab id and details is getting generated.passed And copy those lab id's and navigate to all labs page.......................passed Then validate all lab is in pending status in the latest action in all labs table.passed And click on logout.........................................................passed Then validate login page is displayed.......................................passed When login sequentially for each user and launch labs.......................passed Then validate all labs are created successfully for all users...............failed
exception.full-stacktrace:
